name: FeelWorld P215-9HSD Broadcast Monitor
description: The 21.5" Full HD IPS Broadcast Monitor from FeelWorld features a 1920 x 1080 display and supports up to 1080p60 signals. It comes with a robust stand bracket that lets you set it down on flat surfaces and adjust the tilt angle.

features.Key Features:: Full HD Display, Supports up to 1080p60 | 178 / 178° Viewing Angle | HDMI, 3G-SDI & Analog Inputs/Outputs | RCA Audio Input, Headphone Out, Speakers | Tally Port, 3-Color LED Tally Indicators | Integrated V-Mount Plate | Peaking and Other Analysis Functions | 4-Pin XLR and DC Barrel Power Ports
features.What's in The Box?: Standard Package | FeelWorld 21.5'' Full HD IPS Broadcast Monitor | Mini HDMI Cable | V-Mount Battery Plate (Pre-Installed) | 3A Power Adapter | Tally Kit | Stand Bracket
features.What's in The Box :: FeelWorld 21.5'' Full HD IPS Carry-On Broadcast Monitor (Silver) | Mini HDMI Cable | V-Mount Battery Plate (Pre-Installed) | 3A Power Adapter | Tally Kit | Sunshade | Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
